fn find_matching(items: &[Item], threshold: f64) -> Vec<&Item> {
    items.iter()
        .map(|item| (item, expensive_check(item)))
        .filter(|(_, score)| *score > threshold)
        .filter(|(_, score)| *score < threshold * 2.0)
        .filter(|(_, score)| *score != 0.0)
        .map(|(item, _)| item)
        .collect()
}

fn expensive_check(item: &Item) -> f64 {
    item.data.iter().map(|x| x.powi(2)).sum()
}
